text:
20/03/2024

Dear Dr. Smith,

Re: Patient follow-up

I am writing to update you on the status of your patient.

The patient was initially diagnosed with lung adenocarcinoma on January 15, 2022. He has a history of hypertension managed since 2010. He underwent a right upper lobectomy on February 10, 2022. Adjuvant chemotherapy with cisplatin was initiated in March 2022. Pemetrexed was administered alongside cisplatin.

Unfortunately, a brain metastasis was discovered on October 10, 2023. He received stereotactic radiation therapy for the brain lesion last October.

Today, his weight is 78 kg. His height is 175 cm. His performance status is OMS 1. A CT scan performed two days ago revealed multiple liver lesions. A liver biopsy was performed yesterday to confirm the diagnosis. Molecular testing showed wild-type EGFR. New liver metastases were identified on the recent scan.

We will discuss these findings in our multidisciplinary meeting.

Sincerely,

Oncology Department
